global_description: A small, compact songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a striking combination of buffy orange and grayish tones. The bird's plumage is finely streaked with black and brown, giving it a camouflaged appearance. Its head is adorned with a distinct pale central crown stripe and a buffy eyebrow.

part_details.head: Rounded with a pale central crown stripe and buffy eyebrow.
part_details.plumage: Buffy orange and gray with fine black and brown streaks.
part_details.wings: Short with streaked pattern matching body.

spatial_relations: The pale central crown stripe runs longitudinally along the top of the head.
The buffy eyebrow arches above the eye.
The streaked wings are positioned laterally on the body.
